section_miscategorizations.text: A rotator cuff repair history was noted two years ago.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past surgical history is typically part of the subjective/history section rather than the assessment, though its placement here does not substantially distort the clinical meaning.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is taking norvasc at a dosage of 5 mg per day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes an existing medication regimen, not a new order or change; per instructions, current medications belong in the Subjective section unless framed as a treatment change.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor continued the patient on metformin 500 mg twice a day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a plan-level medication decision and is acceptable in P, but could be more clearly distinguished from simple current-medication listing; classification as plan is still essentially correct.
